---
title: "This path has wandered"
description: "The requested Math Nomad page could not be found."
page-layout: full
toc: false
search: false
sitemap: false
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <meta name="robots" content="noindex">
---

::: {.content-block .mn-empty-page .mn-not-found}
<p class="mn-kicker">404 · PAGE NOT FOUND</p>

## The page is not here, but the mathematics is still nearby.

The address may have changed, or the path may never have existed. Begin again from the homepage, browse the latest writing, or open the interactive laboratory.

[Return home](index.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}
[Browse writing](writing/index.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-dark}
[Open the laboratory](https://lab.mathnomad.in/){.btn .btn-outline-dark}
:::
